## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that alters existing behavior)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Translation / i18n
- [ ] Chore / build / release

## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran. Include platform(s): macOS / Windows / Linux. -->

- [ ] `npm run test:export` passes
- [ ] Manually exercised the changed UI / flow in `npm run dev`
- [ ] (If packaging-related) `npm run pack` and opened the packaged app

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow the [commit style guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-messages)
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By` lines in my commits
- [ ] I updated documentation where relevant (README / CONTRIBUTING / CHANGELOG)
- [ ] I did not introduce unrelated changes or reformatting
- [ ] I respected the [architecture principles](../CONTRIBUTING.md#project-architecture) (visual/logic decoupling, no new globals unless needed, SQLite for persistence)
